text:
BY MR. R.G RAO.
"Nadis relied more on current transits than on any Dasa system
to time events. Appreciating Mr. rao's wmk Dr. Raman said Mr.
rao had been ale to study Nadi readings carefully and gain
insights into the techniques of prediction employed in them.
Mrs. GAYATYHRI DEVI VASUDEV. ASSOCIATE
EDITOR.THE ASTROLOGICAL MAGAZINE, making
appreciative references to MR. RAO for his studies in Nadi
Astrology, pointed out this was a subject of great depth and
treachery and unless one was guided properly in its nuances,
could get lost easily. Mr. RAO's effmts in this direction--
RAKESH K. CHOPRA. M.B.A.,M. COM Ph.D.,
MAHARASHTA-INDIA
Mr. R.G Rao -I have read your book "PROFESSION FROM
THE POST OF PLANETS" and I was highly impressed by
your explanations. Since a few years I am quite interested in
Astrology and I have a full right to express my feelings that the
way you have esxplained, no one has explained Astrology so far
(areal Complete SelfLeaming Treatise).
